steps.title: Find the y-intercept value
steps.content: At the $y$-intercept, $x=0$. Substitute into $y=576^{2x+2}$ to get $s=576^{2(0)+2}=576^2=331{,}776$.

steps.title: Look for s in the choices
steps.content: The question asks for an equivalent equation that displays $s$ as a constant, coefficient, or base. Choice A (‘$y={331,776}^{ \left(x+1\right)}$’) uses $331{,}776$ as the base.
